weapons.name: Short Sword
weapons.description: Short Swords are balanced for both attack and defense.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used.
Also raises maximum RP and STR.

weapons.name: Long Sword
weapons.description: Long Swords are both long-ranged and effective.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used.
Also raises maximum RP and STR.

weapons.name: Spear
weapons.description: Spears allow for attacks to be made from afar.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used.
Also raises maximum RP and STR.
Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used.
Also raises maximum RP and STR.

weapons.name: Dual Blades
weapons.description: Dual Blades concentrate on combat effectiveness.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used.
Also raises maximum RP and STR.

weapons.name: Fist
weapons.description: Skill needed to use your own fists when attacking foes.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used.
Also raises maximum RP and STR.
Higher skill levels increase max RP while keeping its consumption low.
Also raises INT, FIRE M.ATK and M.DEF.
Higher skill levels increase max RP while keeping its consumption low.
Also raises INT, WATER M.ATK and M.DEF.
Higher skill levels increase max RP while keeping its consumption low.
Also raises INT, EARTH M.ATK and M.DEF.
Higher skill levels increase max RP while keeping its consumption low.
Also raises INT, WIND M.ATK and M.DEF.
Higher skill levels increase max RP while keeping its consumption low.
Also raises INT, LIGHT M.ATK and M.DEF.
Higher skill levels increase max RP while keeping its consumption low.
Also raises INT, DARK M.ATK and M.DEF.

magic.name: Love
magic.description: Higher skill levels increase max RP.

bonuses.description: Also raises intelligence and magic defenses, and slowly cures love magic.

farming.name: Farming
farming.description: Skill needed to effectively use farm tools.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels decrease RP consumption while raising maximum HP/RP and vitality.

farming.name: Logging
farming.description: Skill needed to cut down lumber.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels decrease RP consumption while raising maximum HP/RP and vitality.
Higher skill levels decrease RP consumption and make it easier to mine.
Also raises maximum HP/RP and vitality.

farming.name: Fishing
farming.description: Higher skill levels decrease RP consumption and make it easier to catch fish.

bonuses.description: Also raises maximum RP and intelligence.

recipe.name: Cooking
recipe.description: Higher skill levels increase the number of recipes you can use, and makes it easier to learn new ones.

bonuses.description: Also raises maximum RP and vitality.

recipe.name: Forging
recipe.description: Higher skill levels increase the number of recipes you can use, and makes it easier to learn new ones.

bonuses.description: Also raises max RP, INT, and VIT.

recipe.name: Chemistry
recipe.description: Higher skill levels increase the number of recipes you can use, and makes it easier to learn new ones.

bonuses.description: Also raises max RP, INT, and VIT.

recipe.name: Crafting
recipe.description: Higher skill levels increase the number of recipes you can use, and make it easier to learn new ones.

bonuses.description: Also raises max RP and INT.

life.name: Searching
life.description: Skill that increases when you open treasure chests or find hidden items.

bonuses.description: Higher skill level raise max RP and INT, and may yield better items.

life.name: Walking
life.description: Skill that increases as you walk.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise maximum HP/RP and vitality.

life.name: Sleeping
life.description: Skill that increases with restful sleep in bed.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise maximum HP/RP, strength, intelligence and vitality.

life.name: Eating
life.description: Skill that increases as you eat food.

bonuses.description: Slowly raises maximum HP/RP, strength, intelligence and vitality.

defense.name: Defense
defense.description: Skill that increases as you get attacked.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise HP and vitality.

defense.name: Resist Poison
defense.description: Skill that increases by poisoning foes or being poisoned.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise INT and VIT.

defense.name: Resist Seals
defense.description: Skill that increases by sealing foes or veing sealed.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels make you more resistant and raise INT and VIT.

defense.name: Resist Paralysis
defense.description: Skill that increases by paralyzing foes or being paralyzed.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels make you more resistant and raise INT and VIT.

defense.name: Resist Sleep
defense.description: Skill that increases when put to sleep or by making foes sleep.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels make you more resistant and raise INT and VIT.

defense.name: Resist Fatigue
defense.description: Skill that increases by being fatigued, or by making foes fatigued.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels make you more resistant and raise INT and VIT.

defense.name: Resist Cold
defense.description: Skill that increases when sick, or by making foes sick.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels make you more resistant and raise intelligence and vitality.

defense.name: Resist Knockout
defense.description: Skill that increases when you get knocked out, or by knocking out foes.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels make you more resistant and raise maximum RP.

other.name: Bathing
other.description: Skill that increases when you take a bath.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise maximum HP/RP and vitality.

other.name: Taming
other.description: Skill that increases when you tame, brush or give presents to monsters.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase monsters' ATK and DEF and raise INT.

other.name: Throwing
other.description: Skill that increases when you throw items or monsters.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels increase throwing damage, decrease RP consumption and raise STR, VIT, and ATK.

other.name: Leadership
other.description: Skill that increases as you lead a party of fellow adventurers.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise STR, INT and your party's ATK and DEF.

other.name: Bartering
other.description: Skill that increases as you sell items.

bonuses.description: Higher skill levels raise INT and may teach you sales techniques to use in your store.
